user_feedback:
utils.js:30 Uncaught TypeError: p.collideRectRect is not a function
    at checkAABB (utils.js:30:14)
    at Enemy.update (entities.js:366:47)
    at game.js:135:42
    at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
    at updateGame (game.js:135:27)
    at p.draw (game.js:109:13)
    at _main.default.redraw (p5.js:70809:27)
    at _draw (p5.js:63046:25)
analysis:
- Issue identified: The error `TypeError: p.collideRectRect is not a function` indicates that the `p5.collide2d` library method is not correctly attached to the p5 instance `p` in the current environment. This causes the game to crash whenever a collision check is performed (e.g., enemy updates).
- Files affected: `utils.js`
- Changes needed: Replace the call to `p.collideRectRect` inside the `checkAABB` function with a manual AABB (Axis-Aligned Bounding Box) collision check. This removes the runtime dependency on the external library function for this operation and resolves the crash while maintaining identical physics behavior.
